regulatory_events.title: Anthropic Blacklisted by White House
regulatory_events.summary: Trump administration labeled Anthropic a 'supply chain risk' and ordered federal agencies to stop using Claude after the company refused to lift safety guardrails for military use.

regulatory_events.title: Privacy Commissioner Updates Enforcement Guidance
regulatory_events.summary: Australian Privacy Commissioner provided updated guidance on Privacy Act enforcement approach, prioritizing rental tech, connected vehicles and tracking pixels.

regulatory_events.title: EU AI Act Training Data Transparency
regulatory_events.summary: Researchers found many AI companies have not fulfilled EU AI Act obligations requiring companies to share summaries about how their AI models were trained.

regulatory_events.title: Proposed NIS2 and CSA2 Reforms
regulatory_events.summary: European Commission's new cybersecurity package proposes to overhaul the Cybersecurity Act and amend the NIS2 Directive while companies prepare for existing NIS2 implementation.

legal_tech_signals.description: Launched 'Live Assist' capability that can join legal conversations in real time to detect contradictions
Formed partnership with LegalEng Consulting Group (ex-Ironclad team) to provide 'forward deployed' offerings for in-house teams
Partnered with UpLevel Ops to provide AI-native legal intelligence platform with forward deployed model for in-house teams
Lawyer Zack Shapiro used Claude Skills facility to create what he calls a 'Claude-Native Law Firm', generating 7M+ views and significant industry reaction
Survey found 80% of lawyers now use AI at least weekly, 40% use it several times per day for both personal and professional use

top_stories.headline: OpenAI Takes Pentagon Contract After Anthropic Refuses on Safety Grounds
top_stories.why_it_matters: This represents the first major split in the AI industry along ethical lines, with Anthropic being blacklisted as a 'supply chain risk' for refusing to compromise safety guardrails for military use, while OpenAI immediately stepped in to take the deal.

top_stories.headline: Lawyer's Claude Skills Implementation Goes Viral with 7M+ Views
top_stories.why_it_matters: Zack Shapiro's 'Claude-Native Law Firm' demonstrates practical AI adoption in legal practice, showing how lawyers can leverage AI tools for competitive advantage and generating massive industry attention.

top_stories.headline: Major Legal Tech Partnerships Signal Industry Consolidation
top_stories.why_it_matters: Multiple partnerships including Sandstone with ex-Ironclad team and Chamelio with UpLevel Ops suggest the legal tech sector is maturing with more sophisticated 'forward deployed' service models for enterprise clients.

one_to_watch.headline: Harvey Survey Shows 80% of Lawyers Now Use AI Weekly
one_to_watch.why_it_matters: This represents a tipping point in legal AI adoption, with significant implications for mobile AI integration and the future of legal practice workflows.
